song.title: Ready For You
song.author: Kutless
song.presentation: V1 P C V2 P C B C
song.lyrics:
[V1] .A A/C# D2 E Lord, You take my heart away with Your love . A A/C# D2 E And I am willing to put all my faith in Your plan.
[P] .F#m E D2 Come and take my life. .F#m E D2 E Make my soul refreshed in truth now.
[C] .A E D2 I am ready for You. .A E D2 E Take my heart and make me new now. .A E D2 I am ready for You . F#m E D2 (G E D2 E) To come and fill my soul.
[V2] .A A/C# D2 E Cleanse all of my mind that is not of You. .A A/C# D2 E Break me, teaching me how to find rest in Your hands.
[B] .F#m A Whatever it takes, . D2 E I'm needing to make Your will be done . F#m A And I'm letting go of my control, . D2 E For I see what You've done in me.
